professional_summary: AI Engineer with 1+ year of experience building enterprise GenAI systems, multi-agent orchestration platforms, and AI workflow automation solutions within BFSI-focused environments at TCS. Experienced in RAG pipelines, FastAPI backend systems, Azure OpenAI, agentic AI architectures, and real-time AI workflows.

highlights: Enterprise AI Solutions: Designed and developed GenAI-based automation solutions and AI prototypes for BFSI enterprise use cases in collaboration with internal stakeholders and client teams.

AI Test Suite Generator: Built AI-powered Test Suite Generator using Azure OpenAI, RAG pipelines, and prompt engineering techniques to generate 1200+ automation-ready test cases from business requirement documents.
QA Automation Impact: Reduced manual QA effort by approximately 80–90% through automated test generation workflows validated by enterprise QA teams.
Backend Engineering: Developed real-time backend systems using FastAPI, async execution, REST APIs, and WebSockets for streaming AI workflows and orchestration.
Multi-Agent Orchestration: Architected scalable Multi-Agent Orchestrator platform enabling modular agent integration using A2A communication protocols.
AI Workflow Integration: Integrated Azure OpenAI, Groq API, Google ADK, LangChain, and PostgreSQL into unified orchestration workflows and persistent AI systems.

projects.title: Multi-Agent Orchestrator Platform
projects.description: Built scalable orchestration platform for managing communication and execution across multiple AI agents using FastAPI, PostgreSQL, WebSockets, and Azure OpenAI. Implemented async execution, A2A-based communication layers, and accelerator framework to auto-generate A2A-compliant servers from agent scripts.

projects.title: FinGuard-AI
projects.description: Developed AI-powered personal finance platform using RAG pipelines and LLMs to analyze financial behavior, generate personalized recommendations, and evaluate spending risks using real-time inference through Groq API.

achievements.title: Runner-Up
achievements.detail: TCS Quantum Hackathon for developing innovative technology solutions in collaborative team environment.

achievements.title: Participation
achievements.detail: Participated in Google 5-Day Agentic AI Capstone Program focused on modern agentic AI systems and workflows.
